name: Bitquery
description: Blockchain data platform with GraphQL APIs, Kafka streams and real-time WebSockets across 40+ chains for analytics and monitoring.

seo.title: Bitquery — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Bitquery: Blockchain data platform with GraphQL APIs, Kafka streams and real-time WebSockets across 40+ chains for analytics and monitoring.

when_to_use: Real-time blockchain event monitoring via WebSocket
GraphQL queries for DeFi protocol analytics
Cross-chain token transfer tracing for compliance
Kafka streams for high-frequency on-chain data ingestion
Smart contract event indexing for dapp dashboards

review.verdict: The go-to GraphQL window into multichain data—just mind query costs when you scale.
review.best_for: Analytics, trading, and monitoring apps needing cross-chain on-chain data
review.not_for: Simple single-chain reads where Alchemy or direct RPC is cheaper

lock_in.reason: Blockchain data via GraphQL, queries portable
